Interrupt Type

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x38
Size:
0x4
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

Selects level or edge sensitivity for each Port A interrupt source. 0=level-sensitive, 1=edge-sensitive.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] inttype rw 0x0 INTTYPE

Field Descriptions

inttype - INTTYPE

0=level-sensitive, 1=edge-sensitive
